title: tagetes praetermissa
intro: Tagetes praetermissa, also known as Mexican marigold, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It possesses antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tagetes praetermissa include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. This plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
